title: RelationalDbProcessor provides a type-safe base class with per-drive namespace isolation and lifecycle migration hooks
content: The v6 Reactor provides `RelationalDbProcessor<DB>` as a base class for processors that need database access. Key features: `getNamespace(driveId)` static method creates per-drive database isolation preventing data collisions; `initAndUpgrade()` lifecycle hook runs migrations on startup; `this.relationalDb` provides a typed Kysely instance; `query(driveId, relationalDb)` static method enables querying from subgraphs. The factory creates namespaced stores via `module.relationalDb.createNamespace<T>(namespace)`. Scaffolding is generated with `ph generate --processor <name> --processor-type relationalDb --document-types <type>`.
description: Extend RelationalDbProcessor<DB> for built-in this.relationalDb access, getNamespace(driveId) isolation, and initAndUpgrade().
